bucket: A (Limited company / BTL company operation + Incorporation mechanics + Property partnership / LLP)
cannibalisation_notes: substantial-shareholding-exemption-sse — HIGH CANNIBAL RISK with existing comprehensive page substantial-shareholding-exemption-property-companies (committed 2026-05-22). Existing page covers trading-vs-investment test, 10%/12-month test, FA 2017 reforms, automatic / loss-symmetry asymmetry, immediately-after rule, £8m DevCo worked example, buyer's asset-vs-share-sale preference, intra-group transfer interactions, para 5 anti-avoidance, foreign-subsidiary scope, group-relief interaction. Differentiator carved: positioning this pick as DEEPER STATUTORY-MECHANICS REFERENCE LAYER for property-advisor / FD audience — family of sub-exemptions (QII para 7A + para 3A subsidiary + para 15A repurchase interaction), s.179 degrouping FA 2011 modification mechanic, para 5 anti-avoidance depth + non-statutory clearance availability under CIRD80570+, pre-disposal sequencing playbook, property-group worked examples beyond £8m DevCo. STAGE 1B REVIEWER MUST DECIDE: (a) carve survives — proceed to Stage 2 with deeper-reference-layer positioning; (b) carve insufficient — REDIRECT slug to existing page (recommended fallback). If REDIRECT chosen, this pick consumes minimal Stage 2 effort (redirect record only) and slug retains generic-search-term capture funnelling to existing comprehensive page.

transferring-a-business-out-of-a-company — LOW-TO-MODERATE CANNIBAL RISK. Closest existing pages cover slices (MVL — depth; EOT — depth; SSE — sibling + existing page; portfolio-level exit — different scope; pre-sale extraction — one tactic; extraction-sequence pillar — cash-only; time-pressure — different time-frame) but the prior BROAD entity-exit decision frame is unaddressed. Differentiator: ENTITY-EXIT DECISION FRAME covering all 5 routes (asset sale + extract; share sale; in-specie + dissolution; MVL; strike-off) at the comparison layer + cross-links OUT to route-specific depth pages. Mirror-relationship to A1 M2-A-B1 a-complete-guide-on-incorporating-a-company-in-uk is the principal navigational anchor (this pick is the OUT-OF-LtdCo mirror to A1's INTO-LtdCo formation side). No CANNIBAL conclusion — fills clean entity-exit-decision-frame layer gap. Stage 1b reviewer to validate that the mirror-relationship + decision-frame positioning vs route-depth distinction is operationally sustainable.
